description: Crafted from leather, this brown wallet from turtle is fabulously stylish and well organized. This two-fold wallet has lots of inner storage making it perfect for everyday use. You'll not only enjoy the practical use of the wallet. Dimensions: 11.5 cm x 9.5 cm Has two main compartments with fabric lining for durability Six credit card slots with a flap for space Two insert pockets with a mesh id card slot One compartment with a press buttoned closure on the right for coins Branding embossed on the top and on the coin pocket Care Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
